# Generated by tools/generate_stellar_ai_director_patch.py.
# Narrow current-vanilla full-object overrides for the colony build-out plan.
# Humans retain vanilla designation access. AI roles use native designation
# weights; no event, carrier flag, or forced designation manufactures the role.

@stickiness = 10
@stickiness_low = 5
@zone_rural = 10

col_city = {
	icon = GFX_colony_type_urban

	potential = {
		owner_or_space_owner? = {
			is_regular_empire = yes
			is_nomadic = no
		}
		NOR = {
			uses_district_set = city_world
			uses_district_set = ring_world
			uses_district_set = habitat
			uses_district_set = cosmogenesis_world
		}
		is_special_colony_type = no
		is_capital = no
		NOT = { is_planet_class = pc_nanotech }
	}

	inline_script = {
		script = colony_types/colony_type_planet_modifier
		MODIFIER = trader_jobs_bonus_workforce_mult
	}

	ai_building_set_affinity = {
		trade = 2.0
	}

	weight_modifier = {
		modifier = {
			add = @stickiness_low
			has_designation = col_city
		}
		modifier = {
			has_any_trade_zone = yes
			add = @zone_rural # intended, this is not a particularly great colony designation
		}
		inline_script = {
			script = colony_types/shared_weights_urban
		}
	}
}

col_research = {
	icon = GFX_colony_type_research

	potential = {
		NOR = {
			uses_district_set = city_world
			uses_district_set = ring_world
			uses_district_set = habitat
			uses_district_set = cosmogenesis_world
		}
		is_special_colony_type = no
		is_capital = no
		owner_or_space_owner? = {
			is_wilderness_empire = no
			is_nomadic = no
		}
		NOT = { is_planet_class = pc_nanotech }
	}

	inline_script = {
		script = colony_types/colony_type_planet_modifier
		MODIFIER = researcher_jobs_bonus_workforce_mult
	}

	ai_building_set_affinity = {
		research = 2.0
		physics = 1.5
		society = 1.5
		engineering = 1.5
	}

	weight_modifier = {
		modifier = {
			add = @stickiness
			has_designation = col_research
		}
		inline_script = {
			script = colony_types/shared_weights_research
		}
		inline_script = {
			script = colony_types/shared_weights_urban
		}
		# Volcanic Worlds
		complex_trigger_modifier = {
			trigger = num_districts
			parameters = {
				type = district_polytechnic
			}
			mode = add
		}
		complex_trigger_modifier = {
			trigger = num_free_districts
			parameters = {
				type = district_polytechnic
			}
			mode = add
		}
		# Native, bounded research specialization: prefer suitable worlds while
		# preserving a soft one-third ceiling and allowing bad roles to unwind.
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			staid_research_role_candidate = yes
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.2
			OR = {
				staid_research_role_reachable = no
				AND = {
					owner = { staid_research_designation_under_soft_cap = no }
					NOT = { has_designation = col_research }
				}
			}
		}
	}
}
